Added_Camera/UI.name: DFFlagFixSpawnCameraLookingDown
Added_Camera/UI.mechanism: Corrects the camera angle when a player spawns in the game.
Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Prevents players from starting the game looking at the ground, enhancing the initial experience.

Added_Camera/UI.name: FFlagAddOriginalGuidAttributeOnScriptClone2
Added_Camera/UI.mechanism: Adds a unique identifier to cloned scripts to track their origin.
Added_Camera/UI.purpose: Helps developers manage scripts better by knowing where they came from, reducing confusion.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAcousticSimulationPathfindingManhattanHeuristic
Added_Other.mechanism: Implements a new pathfinding algorithm that uses Manhattan distance for navigation.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves character movement and navigation in games, making it more efficient and realistic.

Added_Other.name: FFlagBootcampCLI180439
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables a new command line interface for bootcamp features.
Added_Other.purpose: Makes it easier for new players to access and learn game development tools.

Added_Other.name: FFlagOCNewTelem
Added_Other.mechanism: Introduces new telemetry features for tracking game performance and player interactions.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides developers with better insights into game performance, helping to create a more enjoyable experience for players.

Added_Other.name: FFlagPreventRenamingFiberRunners
Added_Other.mechanism: Restricts renaming of certain internal processes.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures stability and consistency in game performance for players.

Added_Other.name: FFlagProcessDarwinWorkerSetQosClass
Added_Other.mechanism: Changes the quality of service class for worker processes in the Darwin system.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances performance and responsiveness of game processes.

Added_Other.name: FFlagPTFDeviceInfo
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables the collection of device information for performance tracking.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps improve game performance by understanding how players are using different devices.

Added_Other.name: FFlagPTFDeviceInfoParameters
Added_Other.mechanism: Adds parameters for device information in the player tracking framework.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps developers understand the devices players are using, optimizing game performance.

Added_Other.name: FIntAcousticSimulationDensityCacheMaxRetries_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Defines the maximum number of attempts to retrieve acoustic simulation data.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures better sound accuracy in the game environment.

Added_Other.name: FIntAcousticSimulationPathCacheMaxRetries_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many times the system retries acoustic simulations.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves sound accuracy in games by managing simulation attempts.
